dict.string: Access to field 'spc_next' results in a dereference of a null pointer (loaded from variable 'next')
Access to field 'spc_next' results in a dereference of a null pointer (loaded from variable 'next')
Access to field 'sym_type' results in a dereference of a null pointer (loaded from variable 'symbol')
Access to field 'sym_type' results in a dereference of a null pointer (loaded from variable 'symbol')
Although the value stored to 'slice' is used in the enclosing expression, the value is never actually read from 'slice'
Although the value stored to 'slice' is used in the enclosing expression, the value is never actually read from 'slice'
Access to field 'fld_array_info' results in a dereference of a null pointer (loaded from variable 'field')
